resources.string: ☕ You\'re already heading to a coffee
You\'ve accepted an invite: you can start your own once it ends.
No coffee yet this week: start an Extreme Coffee to keep your streak.
Who\'s on a coffee break now
Removes profile, nickname and data. Permanent.
Your profile, nickname and associated data will be removed. This action is permanent.
Extreme Coffee will close. Your data stays saved on the device.
Here you\'ll find the Extreme Coffees your friends invited you to.
The app will reload in the selected language.
Extreme Coffee only uses the data needed to help you meet friends for a coffee.

• Location: to show you on the map during an Extreme Coffee and find nearby cafés.
• Contacts: to recognise which friends already have the app and invite them.
• Camera: for your profile photo and the final selfie.
• Notifications: to alert you when you get an invite.
You can grant or revoke each permission anytime from the system settings.
You can delete your profile and associated data anytime from Account → \"Delete account and data\".
For full details on what data we collect and why, read the Privacy Policy.
By using Extreme Coffee you accept these terms. If you don\'t agree, please don\'t use the app.
Extreme Coffee is an app that lets you invite friends to meet for a coffee within a short time window, showing participants\' location during the event.
You agree to use the app lawfully and respectfully, not to harass other users and not to post offensive or misleading content. You are responsible for the activity carried out by your account.
To use the app you provide a nickname and a phone number. You are responsible for the accuracy of the data entered and for keeping your device secure.
Location sharing happens only during an active Extreme Coffee and with the people involved. Meetups are at your own responsibility: use common sense and caution.
The app is provided \"as is\". We don\'t guarantee it is error-free or always available and, within the limits of the law, we are not liable for damages arising from use of the service.
We may update these terms; changes will be indicated by the update date.
This text is an initial template to be reviewed by a professional before publishing. It is not legal advice.
This policy explains what data Extreme Coffee processes and how.

• Profile: nickname and phone number, optional profile photo.
• Location: approximate/precise location only during an active Extreme Coffee.
• Contacts: used on the device to recognise friends who have the app.
• Technical data: device identifier and token for notifications.
To let you create a profile, send and receive invites, show participants on the map during an event and send you notifications.
Data is handled through Google Firebase services (database and notifications). Some information stays saved only on your device.
We don\'t sell your data. It is shared only with the users involved in the invites you send or accept, and with the technical providers needed to run the app.
You can delete your profile and associated data anytime from Account → \"Delete account and data\".
For privacy requests you can write to the support address listed on the app\'s store page.
This text is an initial template to customise and have reviewed before publishing on the store. It is not legal advice.
